outputs.technical_risk_register: TR-001: Medium risk. The referenced technical scope contains an unresolved interface or quantitative assumption that may affect downstream design confidence. Status: open. Boundary: recorded as risk only, not resolved.
outputs.open_question_register: OQ-001: What approved source or owner decision is required to confirm the ambiguous interface or quantitative field? Status: open. Linked risk: TR-001.
outputs.burndown_summary: Synthetic burndown state: 1 medium technical risk open, 1 open question open, 1 closure criterion defined, 1 rerun route available. No item is marked closed.
outputs.closure_criteria_register: CC-001: TR-001 and OQ-001 may close only when an approved source reference or explicit owner decision confirms the uncertain interface or quantitative value and the register records that confirmation without exceeding the approved policy.
outputs.owner_followup_needed: Owner follow-up is needed to provide or approve the confirming source, policy interpretation, or decision for OQ-001.
outputs.rerun_routes: RR-001: Rerun this workflow after the owner supplies the confirming source or decision, preserving unresolved status unless the closure criterion is satisfied.
outputs.boundary_review_note: Public-safe synthetic output only. It preserves risk, open question, closure criteria, boundary, and no false resolution.

provenance: Synthetic workflow contract supplied in the prompt

gaps: No concrete risk-scope source content is available beyond the synthetic scenario facts.
The approved risk register policy is named as an input but its detailed rules are not provided.
downstream_handoff: Send TR-001, OQ-001, CC-001, and RR-001 to the next governance or owner-review step.
Keep all items open until the defined closure criterion is satisfied by an approved source or owner decision.
